query:
INSERT INTO push_subscriptions (
                    usuario_id,
                    endpoint,
                    p256dh,
                    auth,
                    plataforma,
                    activa
               )
               VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, TRUE)
               ON CONFLICT (endpoint)
               DO UPDATE SET
                    usuario_id = EXCLUDED.usuario_id,
                    p256dh = EXCLUDED.p256dh,
                    auth = EXCLUDED.auth,
                    plataforma = EXCLUDED.plataforma,
                    activa = TRUE,
                    updated_at = NOW()
